issue.message: `checkClientTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
`checkServerTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
`checkClientTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
`checkServerTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 28. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
The resource `R.xml.backup_rules` appears to be unused
The resource `R.xml.data_extraction_rules` appears to be unused
The resource `R.mipmap.dp_adb_otg` appears to be unused
The resource `R.mipmap.dp_hridayan` appears to be unused
The resource `R.mipmap.dp_shizuku` appears to be unused
The resource `R.mipmap.ic_launcher_background` appears to be unused
The resource `R.mipmap.ic_launcher_foreground` appears to be unused
The resource `R.mipmap.ic_launcher_monochrome` appears to be unused
The following unrelated icon files have identical contents: ic_launcher_foreground.png, ic_launcher_monochrome.png
